card_description: Jim Briskin (meaning "Briskin = brisk one") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *The Crack in Space*. First Black president of the United States in an overpopulated future. Name note: A brisk decisive man. PKD's vision of Black political leadership decades before it happened. First appears in *The Crack in Space*.

reference.brief: First Black president of the United States in an overpopulated future
reference.significance: PKD's vision of Black political leadership decades before it happened
